ciDelegation.reason: avoid duplicate Docker-backed dependency startup cost

evidence.artifact: command log or CI step summary
govulncheck output or security job summary

evidence.requiredWhen: dependency changes affect storage, config, discovery, MQ, or gateway packages

ownership.scope: direct dependencies imported by the gofly root module at runtime or by public packages
ownership.upgradeTrigger: runtime, REST, RPC, gateway, cache, governance, observability, or CLI package imports change
ownership.integrationDelegation: run make integration-tests when the dependency affects storage, discovery, MQ, gateway, or observability behavior
ownership.rollbackGuidance: revert the dependency version or pin the previous minor release when module verification, vulnerability scanning, or integration evidence fails

ownership.scope: dependencies required only by generated services, generated models, examples, or compatibility profiles
ownership.allowedLocation: generated project go.mod or isolated temporary test module
ownership.upgradeTrigger: template, profile, model, OpenAPI, RPC descriptor, or generated production service output changes
ownership.integrationDelegation: use generated-project smoke or generated version compatibility gates instead of adding generated-only dependencies to the root module
ownership.rollbackGuidance: pin the generator profile and keep the dependency in the generated project go.mod until generated compile smoke passes

ownership.scope: Go tool directives, release tooling, security scanners, linters, and CI-only tools
ownership.allowedLocation: root go.mod tool directives and release configuration
ownership.upgradeTrigger: Go version, govulncheck, gosec, golangci-lint, goreleaser, SBOM, provenance, or release artifact tooling changes
ownership.integrationDelegation: delegate Docker-backed coverage to required CI integration jobs unless the tool directly changes generated or runtime behavior
ownership.rollbackGuidance: pin the previous tool directive or release configuration until local release snapshot and security evidence pass

ownership.scope: dependencies that affect storage drivers, discovery clients, MQ clients, gateway transcode, Docker images, or integration profiles
ownership.allowedLocation: root go.mod only when imported by root packages; otherwise generated project go.mod or integration fixture module
ownership.upgradeTrigger: storage, config, discovery, MQ, gateway, RPC, Docker, or integration profile dependencies change
ownership.integrationDelegation: CI may set DEPENDENCY_UPGRADE_RUN_INTEGRATION=false only when the required integration matrix covers the same affected family
ownership.rollbackGuidance: pin the previous dependency and block release promotion when Docker-backed integration logs or required-check evidence are missing
